# Protocol Types

These Dart types mirror the Rust types in `paw-proto/src/lib.rs`.

## Important Rules
- ALL messages include `v: 1` (protocol version)
- `parseServerMessage()` rejects messages without `v` field
- Keep this in sync with Rust types manually (no codegen between Rust ↔ Dart)

## Running Code Generation
After flutter is installed:
```
cd paw-client
flutter pub get
flutter pub run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
```

## Generated Files
- `messages.g.dart` is generated by `json_serializable`
- Do not edit it manually
